violations.description: Refrigerated Storage. — --Refrigerator or cold storage was insufficient or ineffective at maintaining potentially hazardous food at a temperature of 41F or less. -1 door coke cooler at 47F. Adjusted.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need cleaned. -Floors need painted in dry storage/cooler area.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean fronts of coolers in storage area.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Floors need repainted in dry storage area.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor edges need more cleaning in kitchen area.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
Design, installation, clean, and maintained (1 pt deducted)
